---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/george-barzizza-60965425a/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/barzigt0-oss
---

Hello, my name is George Barzizza, and I created this blog to showcase some of my data coursework. Each post shares a different story, often tying in some aspect of sustainability. From environmental economics to student housing energy consumption, this blog offers an array of insights that can help inform decisions and identify gaps in the progressing world of sustainable development.
